text: A dollop of ice-cream, a piece of chocolate, pizza, macaroni and cheese!
Ooh how I love fooood.
That is not food.
That is not food. That is junk food!
And you know that junk food is unhealthy, right?
I know, I know. But why?
I mean, how can something that tastes so good, be so bad for us?
It is quite simple Bumbley.
We need food to supply us with nutrients.
Nutrients, which are used to build our body and fuel it.
Why can't junk food do that for us?
Because junk food doesn't have enough nutrients in it.
It does not give you energy to play or stay strong.
I don't mind (not) playing if I can have an extra burger.
Really?
You prefer a burger over playtime?
Actually, no.
I want both.
Can't I have both?
You can.
If you go slow on the junk food and eat more fruits and vegetables.
That way you are giving your body enough nourishment too.
Hmmm.
I think I can do that.
I am sleepy now.
Well, Junk food does that to you.
It makes you sleepy and tired.
You can sleep if you want.
I am going to play basketball.
No! wait for me!
I too want to play.
I promise I will eat fruits and veggies instead of binging on junk food.
Playing is a lot more fun!
